title: hieracium villosum subsp. scorzonerifolium
intro: Hieracium villosum subsp. scorzonerifolium, also known as the hairy hawk's beard, is a plant species in the dandelion family, characterized by its hairy, silvery-green leaves and yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Hieracium villosum subsp. scorzonerifolium include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium villosum subsp. scorzonerifolium include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other remedies.
